posts.text:
Oh, dear. Trump lying about Epstein. Vot surpriz!


MeidasTouch (@MeidasTouch)

WOW: DOJ redactions hid key details about Trump’s Epstein ties — and Rep. Dan Goldman just revealed what they were trying to cover up.

In the unredacted document shown today by Goldman, we can now read the full notes from a 2009 conversation involving Jeffrey Epstein’s attorney and Trump’s attorney.

Here’s what stands out:

Trump’s own attorney set the record straight on whether Epstein was ever expelled from Mar-a
My Big Oil Windfall Profits Tax Act would send any big windfall for Big Oil back to the hardworking people who paid for it at the gas pump.
Trump is cheering on giant oil companies as they exploit world events to reel in massive profits. He couldn’t care less that you and your family are paying the price.

Americans are getting squeezed at the gas pump as Trump’s War in Iran sends gas prices soaring and money flowing to his Big Oil donors.

This week, @RepRoKhanna and I reintroduced a bill to curb this profiteering and provide relief to consumers.

The MAGA system for intimidating judges.

Video

Her explanation was no explanation. Other than involving Trump in the mess.


Mark Warner (@MarkWarner)

Tulsi Gabbard still won’t give straight answers on her involvement in these election raids.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/MarkWarner/status/2034316231981830195#m

“Blocking permits for new clean energy keeps cheap supply off the system,” which forces grid to high-cost fossil units, revenue to Trump donors. Scam.
fortune.com/2026/03/17/elect…

Slippery character who tried to take over DOJ to help Trump’s election denial exits OMB; replaced by slippery character who posed with Leonard Leo, Clarence Thomas and Harlan Crow in their “Make Justice Thomas Happy With Billionaire Gifts Program” portrait.


E&E News (@EENewsUpdates)

Jeff Clark exits White House regs office ift.tt/24NCHig




— https://nitter.net/EENewsUpdates/status/2029992091095306290#m

Republicans refuse hearings on Trump’s War?

Pretty solid sign they know what a disaster it is.  
nbcnews.com/politics/congres…

No surprise. Everything Trump does helps Big Oil and Putin. The conduct is evident, the motive less so. 
semafor.com/article/03/17/20…

Methane polluters should be held to account. Instead, Republicans help them pollute. Fossil fuel money corrupts America.
theguardian.com/environment/…
Trump, Vance, Musk, and Loomer are all provoking threats, and they come heavily from the far right. It is political to stray from those facts to create an illusion of neutrality that just isn’t so.
When the Chief Justice says that these threats come “from all over” and “not just any one political perspective,” it ignores the facts.

Republicans don’t want to fund TSA.

Video

Fossil fuel flunkies go into panic mode over obvious fact that their energy is dangerous, polluting, and whacks consumers with huge price hikes.
washingtonexaminer.com/op-ed…
